thinking.text: The transfer was successful. I should let the customer know that they've been transferred and what to expect.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome, Isabella! I've successfully transferred you to one of our human customer service representatives. 

Here's what to expect:

✅ **Your transfer is complete** - A human agent will be with you shortly

📋 **What I've provided to them:**
- Your verified account information
- All 7 transaction discrepancies with transaction IDs
- The expected vs. actual reward points for each transaction
- Your request to have all disputes submitted on your behalf

The human agent will be able to submit all 7 cash back disputes directly through our system and ensure everything is corrected accurately—both the over-credited and under-credited transactions.

Thank you for your patience throughout this process, and I'm glad I could help identify these discrepancies during your audit. Take care, Isabella! 😊
